## Week in Review: 2026-03-09 to 2026-03-15

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 14.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Labor**: Avg interest 7.3 (+4.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.08)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 6.0 (-27.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.31)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 5.6 (+8.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.25)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 14.3 (-14.5% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.17)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (-100.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.1 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
